summary:
SPIRITUAL REFLECTIONS AND REVIVAL VISIONS: Brandon shares details of a lengthy phone conversation with Billy Burke, reflecting on past religious figures like Kathryn Kuhlman and Ralph Wilkerson. Brandon expresses a strong, emotional anticipation for an imminent return of Jesus and describes personal visions of future spiritual revivals. According to Brandon, these revivals will occur in specific locations, including John Kilpatrick's church, various spots along the I-35 corridor, and Tulsa, Oklahoma. Brandon also details a metaphorical vision of the church transforming into a vibrant butterfly, which Brandon interprets as a new display of divine grace, reflecting a deep personal yearning for spiritual renewal.

GLOBAL EVENTS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon discusses recent natural disasters, specifically pointing to major earthquakes in Venezuela and Japan, framing them as signs of global instability. Brandon associates these physical events with anticipated spiritual awakenings in South America. Additionally, Brandon voices profound concern about global health, referencing reports of Ebola in France and describing a distressing vision of a severe future plague in Europe.

POLITICAL COMMENTARY AND ELECTION VISIONS: Brandon delves into American and international politics, expressing frustration over political figures and concerns about upcoming diplomatic meetings. Brandon recounts vivid visions involving the U.S. Senate, President Trump, Stacy Abrams, Tim Walz, and Kamala Harris. Brandon articulates beliefs regarding widespread voter fraud in cities like Atlanta, Seattle, and Portland, claiming that future seismic events will expose this corruption. Brandon also describes a vision of President Trump presenting a glazed ham to international leaders

SECURITY CONCERNS AND PROTECTIVE PRAYERS: Brandon voices significant concerns regarding national security, particularly around the Fourth of July holiday. Reflecting an intense desire for safety, Brandon prays for the protection of domestic infrastructure, public gatherings, and cruise ships. Brandon describes a specific vision of a cruise ship near Florida, connecting it to fears of a planned viral outbreak.
rawData: [June 25, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/i9gn298oFBM]-[I'm on late tonight; it's 10:00. I know I usually come on at 9:00. My friend Billy Burke called, and I was so excited. I'll never say I've got to get off the phone to do a broadcast when he calls, because I'm telling you, it's a stream of living water coming out of that man. What a blessing. I got to talk to him for over two hours tonight, and I cherish those times listening to the old stories of the generals he's had the pleasure to walk in the shadows of and the people he's been able to be around in ministry, like Kathryn Kuhlman and Ralph Wilkerson—all these great people. It's amazing. I just go, 'Golly.' You know, I lose track of time. When you're talking to somebody like that and you're listening about the old people, you lose track of time and you go, 'My God, what an honor that you would call and talk to me when the Lord tells him to,' you know, just to encourage me to keep going. He listens to us and prays with us, and it's a blessing that he would pray with us. I have so many amazing people that come and pray—so many amazing men and women of God, big platforms, little platforms, all kinds of people all around the world that come and watch us and pray with us. I mean, what an honor. You know, God has called us, I guess, for such a time as this right now to do what we're doing, and I'm humbled by what the Lord has done. It's amazing. But I want to go—how many are here? Oh, we have more than enough. All right, 1,900 right now. We'll start. Well, good evening everybody. Thank you for joining me. We're going to go over some of the news and what's going on today with the signs of the times and the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. It's all around us. I'm telling you, Jesus Christ is coming, and I hope you have your anticipation out there. You know, it's like I said, talking to my friend. He said, 'So many people have said that for so long, so many years, all the time. We've heard that.' But I asked him, 'Sir, do you believe Jesus is coming soon?' And he said, 'Brandon, I believe he could come back tomorrow.' That's as you watch the news, as you see the things happening all around us, you have an anticipation. And even he was saying, 'I'm surprised he hadn't already come.' When you look at what's going on in the news, I believe he could come back tomorrow. I believe he could come back this week. That's how soon I feel like it's coming. You can feel it inside, and it's cool to see it. As you see what happened today, as you see what's going on with America today, talking to him about the revival and talking to Billy about what he believes is coming—it's amazing to hear him talk because you know the Holy Spirit's going to lead us all in the same direction, just differently: different frames, different pictures, but we all get the same puzzle piece, right? Talking about the portals and the revival, I would love for him to come on if he ever feels comfortable. I don't ever try to push things, but to talk about what he's seen about the healing miracles in his ministry with Kathryn Kuhlman and being around and seeing eyes open and ears open in his own ministry and flowing with the gift of the Spirit like he has. One day, I believe he will. But I'm so excited because he wants to do a meeting. He's always talking about doing meetings and what the Lord is doing for this season of his life. You know, he's going into his 70s now, and this chapter where he's at, being an elder flowing in the gifts of the Spirit and where God has called him, it's amazing. Because I'm new and I'm just starting out, listening to somebody who's been in it for 50-some years, for us who are just cutting our teeth, we don't even know. I feel like I'm just trying to find my bearings and going where God has me. It's amazing to hear about healings. I love to hear the testimonies of what Jesus has done for so many people. People think, 'Is healing still for today?' Yes, healing is for today. The delivering power of the Holy Spirit is still for today. He is the same yesterday, today, and forever. And what he did 2,000 years ago, he's still doing today. If you believe—I believe with all my heart—we're going to see some of the greatest miracles that we've ever seen before in the days ahead. I would say, 'Do you believe the revival will be all over America?' and he said, 'I believe it will be in pockets.' There'll be portals; that's exactly what I've seen. That's why I keep telling you I see a migration. There are so many people that will be moving. Yeah, the Holy Spirit will be moving in areas, but there'll be some places that are greater than others. I have brought up Church of His Presence. John Kilpatrick—why I keep bringing up this man. I don't know this man, but I know him by the spirit of what I know in my spirit. When I pray for Church of His Presence, the Lord said that he did it once in his ministry and the well is not there like it was, but it's coming back in a greater capacity. And he said, 'I'm renewing John Kilpatrick's health like youth is renewed like the eagles, and he will finish strong. It's not time for him to go home yet.' He will be a person—I saw him sitting on the stage and the glory and the presence of the Lord filling Church of His Presence again. Then I saw places like a church in Minnesota. I saw a major move of God in a church in Minnesota. I saw Collinsville, where Pastor Chip and Candace are, and Branson. I saw I-35, Oklahoma City going down to Dallas-Fort Worth, a major move of God coming on the highway, I-35. I've seen it out in the Crescent, Oklahoma area. I've seen it in places that you would least expect it, but it's because of the cultivation of prayer. Much prayer has gone up in these areas. It will come out of prayer; it's bathed in prayer. The one that I've seen in the Mabee Center with ORU and with the Victory over across the street with Paul Daugherty being the overflow—a major revival coming to Tulsa, Oklahoma. I believe that Tulsa is a hot spot for the end-time move. I believe there'll be areas that are stronger than others. And even as I talked to my friend today, he said, 'Brandon, I believe that it won't be like that everywhere because not everybody wants it. Not everybody wants to cultivate His presence. Nobody wants to pay the price in prayer. Not everybody wants that. But there's a remnant of people that are hungry, that are desperate for a move of God in these last days, and you're about to see one of the greatest harvests of souls this world has ever seen before.' But I saw people migrating, and I saw properties in Tulsa, properties in areas where it will be so hard to even find rent houses because of the fact that people are just trying to get around the revival. Will it last a long time? I don't believe it will; I believe it'll be a quick work. But I saw a major move of God in Brazil and all these other areas. And I keep talking about it—a new Azusa Street for Asia coming out of South Korea. Just talking that over. What was it like in the tent revival? What was it like reading books from Kathryn Kuhlman and Oral Roberts and A.A. Allen and all these that walked before? Diana has been on a scavenger hunt lately going through the books. I think she's gotten probably ten new books in the last week. These are old books that are hardly printed anymore, that you can't find, and she finds them in certain places, looking for them to try to find books that are not in print anymore. Like, where are the books not in print? What did they read? How did they get where they got? I told her, "I love your brain, the way you think, baby." She's asking, "How did they get it? How was Kathryn Kuhlman inspired? What inspired her? What books did she read? What inspired Oral Roberts to keep going? Where was he at when he first started, like us? What inspired them to keep going? What fed their flame?" Yeah, the Bible. But there were people that you listen to and you glean from, like I do, Billy. And you listen to them and you go, "Okay, I get it." Why try to learn it yourself and reinvent the wheel whenever somebody's already walked in it and they can tell you, "That doesn't work. That didn't work for me," versus the people who keep doing something and hit the wall? You learn out of being dumb and you go, "Well, that really hurt." You know, the car door hurts when you slam your hand in it. Don't do that; that's dumb. Versus the one that says, "I've already done that; don't do that." So, I don't know. I try to be encouraging to you all, but that's where I was tonight. That's why I'm late. But praise the Lord. I want to show you some of the things that happened today in the news. The earthquakes are taking place. And then what we saw last night about the metamorphosis, and the Lord showed us we're about to see something we've never seen before. We're about to see a butterfly fly out of the church that we've never seen before. I saw colors on a butterfly, a beautiful mosaic that was so beautiful and so vibrant. And as I was looking through this cocoon, this caterpillar was inside, pushing with all its might. It represented the church, the body of Christ pushing with all its might. And I saw a breaking point of this caterpillar coming out of the cocoon as a beautiful new butterfly. And the Lord said, "Do you see that butterfly? It's something that you've never seen before. What's about to happen with the church is something that you've never experienced before. It's colors on a mosaic you've never seen, a beautiful tapestry, a beautiful canvas of the Holy Spirit is about to be expressed in a way that the world has never seen before." Because it's His goodness and His mercy. As we say, "Show us Your glory, Lord. Give us an impartation of new demonstrations and manifestations of the glory that we've never seen before." I saw a blowing of goodness and mercy coming out of the Father's hand, and He blew on it and said it was just like Moses, Brandon. He said, "Show me Your glory," and He let His goodness and His mercy pass by. And He said, "It's the goodness of God. It's the goodness of Me that brings man to repentance." It's My goodness and My mercy, Brandon. What you're about to see is a display of the goodness and the mercy of God like we've never seen before. It's His grace—an explosion, a tidal wave of the grace of God. I'm not talking about the grace where you say, "Well, Brandon, it's okay to live in sin and you can do this because God's grace covers it, brother." I'm not talking about living like a heathen and thinking you're going to experience the anointing and the presence of God. Be imitators of God as dear children. You've got to imitate the Lord. What is He doing? He isn't out there going to strip clubs and doing bad things. Be imitators of God as dear children; you be called and separate unto Him and say, "Listen, I'm sold out to You." Yeah, as a child we can fall down and skin our knee, but we don't live there. We pick ourselves back up, brush it off, put some antiseptic on it, and we keep looking to Him, but we don't camp there. You pick yourself back up. And that's what the Lord's wanting. His goodness and His mercy are so good. You don't want to live in sin because His goodness and mercy pulled me out of it. I don't want to stay in the pit. If you're living there, I really challenge you; I really question your thermostat of where your salvation is. He's coming back for the ten virgins, right? Five had their lamps full and five were empty. Five had to go look for it. And in Revelation 19, he talks about the bride that is seeking Him. Revelation 19. He talks about the bride looking for it. "Let us rejoice and be glad and give Him glory, for the wedding of the Lamb has come, and His bride has made herself ready." The bride was already in pursuit. She was looking for Him. He said there's a big difference between where the church is right now. A lot of the church doesn't have an expectation for the return of the Lord. The bride's not making herself ready. You're hearing about prosperity and building your kingdom on this earth. You don't have an expectation. The bride's not even looking for Him. So, I like what he was saying about Revelation 19:7. He said, "The bride is making herself ready." The bride has an expectation of the return of the groom. She's preparing herself. Are you preparing yourself for the coming of the Lord? Are you preparing yourself for what you're about to experience? Are you the virgins that have their lamps full of oil? Or are you the virgins that are just like, "You know what? We know He's coming and we'll wait until the day He comes," and then it's too late? The bridegroom came when you were out trying to get your lamps full. You must remain at a place of full. And that's why He always talks about, "Let your full fight for you." You've got to get in a place where your full is always fighting. What you're full of will come out of you. What are you expecting in these last days? Let your full fight for you in these last days. Don't remain empty. You've got to keep your lamp full of oil in these last days for what's about to happen. There were five that had it ready and five that didn't. Five were taken, five are left. I truly believe in the first round there'll be—I believe there are two different catching-aways. Now, I'm not here to argue theology, but I believe this one's going to shock everyone, the ones that didn't have their lamps full of oil. But the ones that are the bride, that are preparing herself, will be caught up with Him. We're going to go in the rapture—the first round—the ones that are full, the ones that are letting their full fight for them, the ones that are keeping their eyes on Jesus, the ones that have their lamps ready. The bride is in hot pursuit of the groom. You didn't have to warn her because, "I'm not real excited about the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. I really want to get married and have babies and a career, but I'm not really in pursuit of Him." I don't really care because your eyes are focused on something else. But for the groom, I'm telling you, Diana, when we were together, I always looked at her and said, "Baby, you look beautiful today." My eyes, even after all these years, I look at her and say, "You look so beautiful tonight, honey." "Well, honey, you've seen me every day of your life." I know, but you look exceptional today. I'm still in pursuit of my wife. I still love my wife. You have to be in pursuit; don't allow your marriage to grow dull. You can't allow your marriage to die. Keep that pursuit. Be ye imitators of God as dear children; imitate their father. As you look to Him, I want to be more like Him. And as I listen to elders, I go, "I am so far from this." I don't even know if I'm ever going to get halfway close to what has been in some of these people's ministries. But God, I'm imitating You, and I'm in hot pursuit of You. And I know that those that seek Me will find Me; those that knock, I'll open the door unto them. And I believe, you know what, I've got a long way to go, but maybe a short time to get there, right? But I know that inside, as I keep seeking Him, I'll find Him. But I want to encourage you tonight, as I say all of this, be imitators of God. Pursue Him with all your heart. Keep your lamps full. Have an expectation that He's coming back. He could come back tomorrow; He could come back by the end of the year, by September, by the Shemitah, by Rosh Hashanah. What about a revival? I'm believing, but I'm always in pursuit of Him. Keep your lamps full tonight. Always seek Jesus with all your heart. Don't let a day go by without saying, "Jesus, I love You. I'm so glad You're in my life. I'm so glad You came to save me. I'm so glad You redeemed me. I'm so glad You set me free by Your blood, by what You did on that cross for me." That's why I take communion every day. I take it all the time. I've got buckets of it. Why? It's not a religious act to me; this is about relationship. I want to know Him. And once I get it, I don't want to lose it. I don't want to taste and see that the Lord is good and then just visit it and have just a residue of it. I want it to be imparted inside of me so that whenever people see it, it's like Moses—his face is glowing. They have to put a veil over his face because people are freaking out. "What's going on with Brandon?" I have been with the Master. I have been with my King. He's my friend. He is my everything. And that light shines out of me, every pore, every fiber of my being, that I've tasted and I have seen that the Lord is good. Once you taste and you touch the hem of His garment and you get a little bit of the anointing and you get a little bit of the glory on you, there's nothing better. There's nothing more that will change your life other than to keep touching. You pursue it. I question people's authenticity because once you have tasted and you have seen, once you've experienced the glory, once you see your daughter that wasn't able to go to the bathroom and was bound up for weeks and swelled up and the doctors have all these things and God touches her and she doesn't have to have a diaper on anymore... once you taste and see that the Lord is good, there's nothing else that matters. That's what I said last night. I'm dead to it. I can say whatever He wants me to say. If the platform goes away, I'm bold about what He says. I question, do you believe what the Lord is saying to me? I believe it's something different. It's a new generation. You're the one crying in the wilderness like John the Baptist did the first time, warning the people that Jesus was coming and all the things that were happening, right? We're doing it again. He's coming again. He's coming back for His church. There's a major move of God happening. What are you anticipating in your life as you see the signs of the times and the coming Lord Jesus Christ all around you? I give you the hope that there is a shaking to awaken. He's bringing the bride to His side. What side are you on? You can choose today. I want to be on His side and He has a plan for my life, or you can be the ones that are going to get the spanking. I don't want to be in that group. I want to be on the right side of things. So, I want to show you today shakings that are happening right now. You can see it in the news, but I love Revelation 19:7: "Let us rejoice and be glad and give glory." Give Him glory, for the wedding of the Lamb has come and His bride has made herself ready today. The bride is in pursuit, and is she looking for Him? Are you looking? Have you made yourself ready? All right, go ahead. Show them. And this is what's happening in today's news. We have a major earthquake in Venezuela. A major 7.5 earthquake happened in Venezuela today. A shaking is coming to South America. A 7.5 and then a 7.2 right in the same area. Two in the same day. And then there was a 5.6 in California. Did it happen by Malibu? I have to look. 5.6. And then there was—because God said, "I'm going to shake Malibu" and it'll be a sign—a 6.9 in Japan today. The Lord said, "I'm going to shake Malibu. I'm going to shake California." I want to know, did that happen by there? That's interesting. I'm looking for it all the time for Malibu to be shaken. Okay, they felt it in Colombia, they said. Well, they felt it all over the place. Big earthquakes. What does the Lord say? What is this happening with the earth? The earth is shaking and rocking and reeling like a drunkard. The Word said it was coming. And so we're seeing the beginnings of it, the birthing pains. What are we about to see? Major shaking. Why? Because I told you Colombia will be shaken, Venezuela will be shaken, Cuba will be shaken. As we saw earthquakes, Cuba will be shaken. Why? Because it's a representation of what's happening, and in the spiritual realm, it is manifesting in the natural. And a great harvest of souls is coming to Venezuela, Cuba, and Colombia. Watch. And it's going to spread through Brazil. Watch what happens. God is going to pour out His Spirit on South America. Watch. Now look at this. Where is that earthquake at? They're saying it's not. Well, that's a bummer. It's coming. That's San Francisco, so it's further up north. One is down south. Not that I'm trying to believe God for an earthquake for y'all, but I'm believing for—it could be a small one—but I'm believing for Malibu to be shaken. The Lord said, "I'm going to shake Malibu." What is that earthquake? Where is that? In Venezuela. That is a major, major shaking in Venezuela. Major. Bless their hearts; that's terrible. Well, we know what's coming for Venezuela: major revival. They shook the whole building down, son. I bet people are dead in there. Wow, son, that really was bad. It was a bad earthquake. Oh, God. Lord, help them to find the people. I didn't realize it was that bad, son. That's major. Look how split the road is. Are you ready? I feel the anointing of the Holy Ghost on me right now. I feel fire on my arms and my body. Thank you, Holy Spirit. Look at that. That is complete devastation. Look at those buildings all completely falling in, their roofs... that looks like a mall. Yeah. When did this happen? Do they know how many casualties? No, they don't. It was 5.4. Yeah, I think he's blessed that building didn't fall. Do you see the cracks on the side of the walls? It gets worse. Oh no. I wonder if he'll be able to get out. The further he goes down, the less there is. Wow, that is scary. Is that an apartment complex? It looks like it. Wow. Oh Lord, look at the damage. The further he goes down... they're going to have to condemn that building. Look at the elevator, the water, the pipes. Wow. He's blessed; he's still alive. That caved in on those people. Oh, it's terrible. Father, we thank you, Lord, that you help the victims right now, Father, in all this rubble. Father, I thank you, Lord, that they're okay. There's some of them, Father, I know that have perished, but Lord, the ones that are still alive, we thank you, Lord, that you help them find them—find them in all this mess so that they get out of it. Oh, it's sad. Yeah, man. Another huge building fell there. There's so many of them. It destroyed a lot. Oh no. How long did it last? I wonder how long the earthquake lasted like that. He said there will be a shaking in these areas. And then he said, 'I'm going to split the Mount of Olives. I'm going to shake the Dome of the Rock, and the Dome of the Rock will be uninhabitable. I will shake thousand-year-old temples, and they will fall to the ground in the days ahead. I will shake these places and great revival will come.' People are asleep. They don't realize where we are. And this is good. Regardless of whether you say this is really sad, he's trying to wake up the people. The earth is... this is all happening. The tribulation is starting—birthing pains. Pre-trib right now, basically, I want to call it. This is pre-tribulation right here. Do you understand? This is the labor pains upon a woman, so will it be. This is the labor pains happening right now. Labor pains. And I hear most of these people say, 'Well, Brandon, it's going to get better before it gets really dark.' You are on some bad weed. You're not reading your Bible. The Bible says that we're going to see these things. And labor pains don't get better; they get worse and worse and worse, and then the baby comes. And the Bible told us this. So here we are. We're seeing labor pains increase. So stop going down the pipe dreams of all these things. Things are not going to get better. America is not going to get better. Things are going to get worse. The end of the end is at hand. We're there. We're getting closer and closer. Look at what happens. Every day we come on here, we spend an hour a lot of times showing you this stuff—what's happening every day with wars or rumors of wars, shakings, plagues. The Ebola virus is spreading to France now. Yeah, it's in France—Ebola virus. And they're going, 'What? Oh, why France?' I told you: watch Macron. Look at the roads. I said, watch Macron. He is the Ishmael to the Isaac of the Antichrist. He is an Ishmael. Watch what happens with Macron. Macron will become a tyrant in the days ahead like a Hitler. Watch what he does. It doesn't have to be that he's out doing things like Hitler; it's his motive. It's the energy behind him. It is a demonic overshadowing over the man. Look. Wow. Look at those. Wow. I'm surprised that things didn't hit him in the head. Wow. Yeah, it's bad. That's really bad. That's complete devastation. The bridges—look at the bridge. It's going to take years. And with their country falling the way it is, after their government and all that going on, that is a nightmare. Okay, let's move on. Did anybody know that happened today? I didn't until just a couple seconds ago when he just told me. He said, 'Yeah, there was an earthquake.' And then you had that in Japan, too. Oh, in Japan. Yeah. Major Japan. And we're looking for volcanoes to go off. The Lord said major volcanoes are about to erupt, and we're going to see meteors coming in that will bust out windows and things like that. We know that. All signs of the times. Okay, let's keep going. France reports the first case of Ebola outside of Africa in the current outbreak. This is what we're praying against because I've seen a major outbreak, a major plague coming that's like the Black Death, and a major plague will shut down everything and it will kill 350 million people. The Lord said this: 'But I said those that anoint their head with oil, those that take communion, and those that understand Psalm 91 and Psalm 23, the death angel will pass by your house and it will not touch you. You need to know who you are and read this Bible, and the glory of the Lord will come through you and you will lay hands on the sick and they will recover. You will walk in the glorious anointing.' And I saw this and the Lord said, 'You can lessen it. You won't stop it. You will lessen it.' Is this the plague? I saw that it would happen in, I believe, 2027-2028. But there's some people talking about the horses riding. Pastor Steve Ciaccolanti talks about the horses riding, and I said the green horse and the black horse ride together. They ride together. Now, he'd probably disagree with me, but I saw them riding and galloping together. I said, 'The black horse is about to ride and I see the green horse and the black horse riding together.' It's the Chlorophyll horse. Now, I'm sure he would say they're two separate incidents, but I saw them in a vision. And so we see a plague coming. We see major financial stuff going on with the plague. War and plague go hand in hand. War and finances go hand in hand. Plagues and finances go hand in hand—all kinds of pandemics and things like that, like COVID. So is this it? I believe it's early. I don't see it as Ebola, but I saw it with rats. I saw it would be with rats, not bats. And it would be spread on purpose with rats in the days ahead through people of chemistry, and they're shooting the rat with stuff to make it and releasing it into Europe. It was Europe, not Africa. Very, very sad. Okay. Next. And then he said he's going to go to... I don't know, I think it's NATO. Trump's going to go to NATO or Turkey. But he's going to go because Turkey... Who? Trump? Trump is going to Turkey? Yeah. No, he's going to NATO. I don't know what that means—NATO summit. No. Stay home. When? Stay home, sir. Don't go anywhere else right now. Where is this, son? It's like how many times we've warned: don't go over there right now. Pray. Pray right now. Stay here until after the anniversary of America. Wait until after this. And he talks about Turkey? He talks about Turkey. I'm trying to figure out... this is the club. Okay, go ahead. Do you remember last night I saw President Trump? I saw a blue pulse in the Senate. And as I was looking into the Senate, I saw the blue, and it got really dark blue. And then it started to affect the Supreme Court judges. I saw red that was cowards; there was no pulse. It was kind of like they were just idly standing by. And this was concerning December of this year. December and January of this year, I saw a blue pulse coming out of the Senate and they were coming after... and I saw President Trump trying to fly and his wings were clipped. His wings were clipped. He was trying to be an eagle, but he was no longer able to be an eagle because the Senate and the judges clipped his wings. What was beautiful like these wings, the tops of them got cut off and he wasn't able to fly high. I thought that was an interesting vision last night of what the Lord saw. Then I saw Stacy Abrams and I saw Byron Donalds. He had great favor in Jacksonville. In the vision, the Lord said, 'He will have great favor in Jacksonville. He will have great favor in Orlando.' And I saw him rise up. And the Lord said, 'Pray for him.' And I saw a covering over Byron. It was a covering over him, and I saw him flourishing. Lord said, 'Pray for him.' There wasn't a lot of favor in Miami. There wasn't a lot of favor in Fort Lauderdale. Tampa was split. Then I saw Stacy Abrams. In the vision, I saw a dinosaur, like a T-Rex. On the mouth of the T-Rex was a map, and I heard 'districts'. I saw districts concerning voter fraud in Atlanta, specifically in districts to try to overthrow the Senate seat. I heard 'districts' and I saw a map that had blue; it was voter fraud. And I heard Stacy Abrams. When I saw in this vision, I saw it spread in pockets of where she had influence. I saw where she had pockets of influence in Atlanta, in certain areas that were important cities, major voter turnouts. And I saw that this was about a Senate seat.
